basic_details.job_title: AIIA Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Ayurveda (AIIA) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on 13 June 2026 on the official website of AIIA. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIA Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Pharma or M.Sc (Chemistry/ Analytical Chemistry/Medicinal Plants/Phytochemistry)
qualification.details: M.Pharma or M.Sc (Chemistry/ Analytical Chemistry/Medicinal Plants/Phytochemistry) from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25000 - 31000 Per Month (with HRA as applicable)

all_official_links.label: Download AIIA Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the All India Institute of Ayurveda Recruitment 2026 is Project Associate – I. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Project Associate – I position announced by the All India Institute of Ayurveda.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, so there is no specific last date for online application. Candidates need to attend the interview on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for AIIA Project Associate – I?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Project Associate – I post is scheduled to be held on 18 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for Project Associate – I?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Pharma or M.Sc degree in Chemistry, Analytical Chemistry, Medicinal Plants, or Phytochemistry from a recognized University or Institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Project Associate – I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate – I post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate – I position will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000 per month, along with HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for AIIA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate – I post will involve a Walk-in Interview and potentially an Online Mode assessment.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the All India Institute of Ayurveda, New Delhi, with the pincode 110076. Specific details about the exact venue within the institute should be confirmed from the official notification.
